name: Benzalkonium
description: Benzalkonium is a quaternary ammonium compound used as a biocide, a cationic surfactant, and as a phase transfer agent. Benzalkonium is more commonly contained in consumer products in its salt form, benzalkonium chloride. It is used in pharmaceutical products such as eye, ear and nasal drops or sprays, as a preservative. It is an active antimicrobial agent in antiseptic and disinfectant products.
